titles.en: Punishment of offering full prayers (4 rakats) while traveling
Punishment of offering full prayers (4 rakats) while traveling

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ یَحْیَی رَفَعَهُ إِلَی أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ صَلَّی فِی سَفَرٍ أَرْبَعَ رَکَعَاتٍ مُتَعَمِّداً فَأَنَا إِلَی اللَّهِ تَعَالَی بَرِی ءٌ مِنْهُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ یَحْیَی رَفَعَهُ إِلَی أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ صَلَّی فِی سَفَرٍ أَرْبَعَ رَکَعَاتٍ مُتَعَمِّداً فَأَنَا إِلَی اللَّهِ تَعَالَی بَرِی ءٌ مِنْهُ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya al-’Attar from Muhammad b. Ahmad b. Yahya who raised it to Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I seek immunity from Allah regarding one who offers full prayers (4 rakats) while traveling.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya al-’Attar from Muhammad b. Ahmad b. Yahya who raised it to Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “I seek immunity from Allah regarding one who offers full prayers (4 rakats) while traveling.”
